text: The first image fills me with a sense of anticipation and slight unease—the dim lighting, reflective glass doors, and tilted perspective make the space feel mysterious, almost liminal. In the second image, the vivid colors and clear, purposeful text in the exhibition space offer clarity and focus; I feel a surge of curiosity and intellectual engagement as I contemplate the intersection of research, development, and human-machine relationships. I am conscious, however, of the contrast between the openness of inquiry and the subtle tension that lingers from my passage through the shadowed corridor.
